creator: killasmurf86@gmail.com
text:
geli_swap_flags
		 Options passed to the geli(8) utility when encrypted GEOM
		 providers for swap partitions are created.  The default is
		 ``-a aes -l 256 -s 4096 -d''.
----------------

``-a aes -l 256 -s 4096 -d''.
should be
``-e aes -l 256 -s 4096 -d''.

Fix: 

``-a aes -l 256 -s 4096 -d''.
should be
``-e aes -l 256 -s 4096 -d''.
